description: Multiple cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerabilities in the nodereference module in Drupal Content Construction Kit (CCK) before 4.7.x-1.6, and 5.x before 5.x-1.6 ,allow remote attackers to inject arbitrary web script or HTML via nodereference fields, when using (1) the plain formatter or (2) the autocomplete text field widget without Views.module.
